nasb.text: And He came out and proceeded as was His custom to the Mount of Olives; and the disciples also followed Him.

esv.text: And he came out and went, as was his custom, to the Mount of Olives, and the disciples followed him.

cnv.text: 耶穌照常到橄欖山去，門徒也跟著他。

ccb.text: 耶稣离开，像往常一样前往橄榄山，门徒也跟去了。

csbs.text: 耶稣出来，照他的习惯往橄榄山去，门徒们也跟着他。
